original_image_tags: A single page from a document, appearing to be a cover sheet or blank page. The page is off-white with a slight yellowish tint, showing signs of aging. At the top center, the word "RESTRICTED" is printed in a bold, sans-serif, all-caps font. The same word, "RESTRICTED", is printed at the bottom center in the same font. The rest of the page is blank, though faint, ghostly text from the reverse side is visible through the paper, indicating this is likely a scanned page from a multi-page document.

elements.description: A vertical, off-white page with two black stamps reading 'RESTRICTED' at the top and bottom center. Faint, illegible text from the reverse side is visible through the paper.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the same visual elements: an off-white page with two 'RESTRICTED' stamps and faint reverse-side text.
